## What would make the handoff better?

Examples:

- Better failure classification
- Better failing command selection
- More useful local reproduction hints
- Better runner, matrix, or language version extraction

## Raw log

Please attach the raw failed log if it is public and safe to share. Remove
secrets, tokens, private URLs, or personal data before posting.
